ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suicide_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suicide statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the statistic applies */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year when the statistic was recorded */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the individuals */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the individuals */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation of the individuals */,
  "suicides_no" INTEGER /* Number of suicides recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the specified demographic */,
  "suicides_per_100k_pop" REAL /* Suicides per 100,000 population */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality_issues" TEXT /* Data quality concerns or limitations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "soc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the data applies */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year when the data was recorded */,
  "HDI_for_year" REAL /* Human Development Index for the specified year */,
  "gdp_for_year" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product for the specified year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product per capita for the specified year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country for the specified year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country for the specified year */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the country for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the intervention is implemented */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "success_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to measure the success of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention being assessed */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suicide statistic entry related to the assessment */,
  "soc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the socioeconomic data entry related to the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was assessed */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the impact of the intervention */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate the impact */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Results of the impact evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_soc_id FOREIGN KEY ("soc_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_data ("soc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES suicide_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization's role in the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_roles_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_roles_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year when the statistics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, healthcare professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suicide statistic entry being accessed */,
  "soc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the socioeconomic data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_soc_id FOREIGN KEY ("soc_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_data ("soc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES suicide_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "participants" TEXT /* List of participants in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
